questions.question_text_full:
Select the most appropriate synonym of the bracketed word in the following sentence to fill in the blank:

During Covid times, many organizations made ________(sentimental) appeals to raise funds for migrant workers.

Select the most appropriate meaning of the underlined word in the given sentence:

He is an atheist, although he respects everyone's belief.

options.4: One who does not believe in God
